MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: L. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Eric L. Throne. Arnole W. Evje appeared on behalf of the plaintiff and defendant, Antonie Garafola appeared in pro per. Case settled per stipulation of parties, not on record. Trial date is vacated.
